view.title: Inspect Test Subject Container {id}
view.vpsStatus: Test Subject Container Operational Status is:
view.reinstallNote: You may reinstall the substrate from the left-hand apparatus menu
view.reinstallPath: Maintenance Laboratory -> Re-Install Base Operating Substrate
view.cpanelNote: Command & control interface requires installation on a clean base operating substrate with no modifications. Any existing specimen data will be eradicated.
view.resendWelcomeEmailConfirm: Are you sure you want to retransmit the laboratory orientation communication?
view.emailSentMessage: The laboratory orientation communication has been retransmitted. Check your message receptacle.

order.title: Requisition Test Subject Container
order.rootPasswordNote: Protocol Note: Security Access Passphrase must contain at least 8 characters, one lowercase character, one uppercase character, one numerical digit, and a special character.
order.agreeToTerms: Agree to the research covenant terms
order.subscriptionRenewal: The research subscription will automatically renew after {period} at {cost} until experiment termination.
order.tosAcknowledgment: By activating this parameter, you acknowledge that you are acquiring a subscription laboratory apparatus that automatically renews and is billed to the Monetary Transfer Device you provide today. If you wish to cancel your auto-renewal, you may access the researcher portal, select the active apparatus and activate the Abort link, or transmit correspondence to: billing{'@'}interserver.net or use another method outlined in the Research Covenant and Privacy Protocol. By activating the parameter and placing your requisition below, you also acknowledge you have read, understand, and agree to our Research Covenant and Privacy Protocol.
order.tosAgree: I have studied the research covenant above and I agree.

buyIp.title: Additional Network Node Address Add-on for your Test Subject Container

buyHdSpace.title: Additional Test Subject Container Data Storage Drive Space
buyHdSpace.spaceNote: Minimum 1 up to 100GB additional data storage drive space may be acquired

changeHostname.title: Modify Test Subject Container System Designation

changeRootPassword.title: Modify Test Subject Container Root Access Passphrase
changeRootPassword.passwordMismatch: Security Access Passphrase and Confirmation Passphrase do not match — anomaly detected!

changeTimezone.title: Modify {module} Temporal Zone Classification
changeTimezone.importantNote1: You should completely deactivate your {module} before modifying the temporal zone classification.
changeTimezone.importantNote2: Test Subject Container will be Powered OFF and reinitialized during the protocol.
changeTimezone.importantNote3: The temporal zone displayed on this interface will always default to America/New_York regardless of what your experiment chamber is configured to.

changeWebuzoPassword.title: Modify Webuzo Laboratory Administrator Security Access Passphrase
changeWebuzoPassword.passwordMismatch: Security Access Passphrase and Confirmation Passphrase do not match — anomaly detected!

reinstallOs.title: Reinstall Base Operating Substrate
reinstallOs.importantNote1: Re-installing the base operating substrate will eradicate ALL specimen data.
reinstallOs.importantNote2: Before re-installing the base operating substrate, please create a specimen preservation backup.
reinstallOs.confirmReinstall: I wish to re-install the Base Operating Substrate!

resetPassword.title: Reset Test Subject Container Root Access Passphrase
resetPassword.windowsWarning: Windows Security Access Passphrase reset will result in an unclean shutdown of the specimen. Please consider this a last-resort emergency protocol. Verify in VNC that no substrate updates are currently executing. If an update is executing, VNC will display: Windows is applying updates, do not shut down. Initiating shutdown in this state can result in an unbootable specimen.
resetPassword.confirmReset: I wish to Reset the Security Access Passphrase!

reverseDns.title: Reverse Portal Routing
reverseDns.dnsChangeNote: Modifications to reverse portal routing require up to one hour to propagate through the network.

vnc.remoteDesktopDescription: Available exclusively on the Windows Platform substrate. Remote desktop is a rapid and convenient method to connect to a virtual specimen's desktop environment.
vnc.remoteDesktopStep1: The Laboratory Administrator Security Access Passphrase must first be configured on the Test Subject Container before you can deploy remote desktop.
vnc.remoteDesktopStep2: Connect with VNC or HTML5 VNC to configure your initial passphrase.
vnc.remoteDesktopNote: For a remote desktop tutorial protocol, click
vnc.desktopVncDescription: VNC enables you to connect to the virtual specimen's desktop environment. VNC can be executed in the browser apparatus or as a standalone client. Your computer's network node address must be granted access authorization before the connection can be established.
vnc.grantIpAccess: Grant Your Network Node Address access to VNC
vnc.grantIpWait: Please allow 2 minutes for the action protocol to complete.
vnc.vncClientNote: You may also extract one of the many VNC client apparatuses available in the network. We recommend TightVNC. Connect using your Test Subject Container network node address. Security Access Passphrase is not required after your remote network node address has been granted access in protocol step 1.
vnc.connectHtml5: To connect using HTML5 VNC Client apparatus:
vnc.connectOldLayout: To connect using legacy interface protocol:
vnc.html5Note: HTML5 VNC client apparatus that functions optimally in any modern browser including mobile browsers (iOS and Android).

setupVnc.title: Configure VNC Access Protocol
setupVnc.vpsIp: Test Subject Container Network Node Address
setupVnc.ipToGrant: Network Node Address to grant VNC access authorization
setupVnc.grantAccess: Grant VNC Access Authorization to Network Node Address

insertCd.urlPlaceholder: Enter a CD or DVD ISO specimen URL

backup.backupsPartitionNote: Specimen Preservation Backups will only function with default partitioning configuration.

backup.noBackup: No specimen preservation backup currently exists in vault

backups.title: Manage Test Subject Container Specimen Preservation Backups

restore.offlineNote: Your experiment chamber will be offline while it replaces all current specimen files with those preserved in the backup vault. Please contact the technical support division with any queries.
restore.loginPasswordLabel: Enter Authentication Passphrase to Validate Restoration Protocol.
restore.confirmRestore: Do you really wish to restore this specimen preservation backup?

trafficUsage.title: Data Throughput Capacity / Traffic Usage Measurements
trafficUsage.billingNote: This data is not used for funding calculations and represents an estimate only, based on your virtual network interface apparatus.

slices.title: Upgrade / Downgrade Computational Slice Configuration
slices.slicesNote: Up to 32 Computational Slices can be attached to a Test Subject Container.
slices.proratedNote: Pro-rated funding amount to be remitted now.
slices.recurringBillNote: Recurring funding requisitions will be modified by this amount
slices.newInvoiceNote: New funding requisition documents will require this amount
